criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Extent to which the app utilizes AI to enhance productivity, automate tasks, and offer smart suggestions.
criteria.sources: iAppList, Zapier, PCMag, Futurepedia, Native Teams

criteria.name: Category
criteria.description: The primary function of the application, such as chatbot, content creation, email assistant, or project management.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: The intuitiveness and ease of use of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Collaboration Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent to which the app facilitates teamwork through shared workspaces, task assignments, and communication features.

criteria.name: Pricing Model
criteria.description: Availability of free versions, trial periods, and subscription costs.
